Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Connect your North merchant account so Vibe & Pay can send checkouts on your behalf. Credentials are encrypted at rest and never sent to the browser.
Settings.businessSubtitle: Shown to your customers on the payment landing page and in branded emails.
Settings.languageSubtitle: Vibe & Pay's interface language and the language Claude uses when replying to you.
Settings.credentialsSubtitle: From your North dashboard. All three are required to send a checkout.

Chat.emptyHint: Use #checkout to charge a customer, @name to reference one. Try one of these:
Chat.placeholder: Send a checkout, draft an invoice, ask a question…
Chat.suggestion1: Send a checkout to George for $300
Chat.suggestion2: How much did I make this month?
Chat.toolInvoice: Send an invoice with a due date
Chat.toolProducts: List all products in your catalog
Chat.toolProductAdd: Add a product to your catalog
